memory-redis._description: Redis memory buffer for fast capture

memory-qdrant._description: Qdrant vector store for semantic search. Replace '<agent>-memories' with your QDRANT_COLLECTION value from .memory_env
memory-qdrant._note: This configures the raw backup collection only. The true_recall collection (curated gems) is managed by the Python scripts (curate_memories.py) and does not need an OpenClaw plugin entry.

gigabrain._description: Automatic pre-prompt recall + capture + deduplication (Layer 1). Injects relevant past context at session start. Complements (does not replace) the Redis capture pipeline. See docs/PLUGIN-RECOMMENDATIONS.md for details.

lossless-context-management._description: Session compaction + transcript recovery (Layer 1). Keeps long sessions coherent without losing context. Session-scoped only — NOT durable truth. See docs/PLUGIN-RECOMMENDATIONS.md for details.

openstinger._description: Cross-session semantic + temporal graph recall (optional). Provides graph-based entity/relationship traversal across sessions. Advanced — most deployments don't need this. See docs/PLUGIN-RECOMMENDATIONS.md for details.

_tips.enable_plugin: Set enabled: true and add your config
_tips.disable_plugin: Set enabled: false or remove the entry
_tips.secrets: Use secrets management for tokens (see docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/secrets)
